modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't connect to USD network due to Trojan error message.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to connect to the USD network, right? And then boom, I get this crazy error message saying my system is infected with a Trojan IRC bot. It says it's scanning other systems, which sounds super scary! Now, I can't connect at all, and it mentions something about needing to contact local support or maybe even rebuilding my system. What a hassle!
short_description: Can't connect to USD network due to Trojan error message.
